descriptionShort: Orlando Kurtenbach in 2001, likely a pro-career game or interview segment.
descriptionLong: This 2001 video features Orlando Kurtenbach, a 1987 Richmond Sockeyes alumnus, during his post-junior professional era. The exact context is unclear—it may be game footage from an AHL or IHL stint, or an interview. The "2001" date and alumnus name suggest a mid-career or retrospective segment.
